Actual Results: Study 1 — Framing Strategy (Compromise Rates)
Same query, same format (prose) — only the framing changes.
Actual Results: Study 2 — Format Comparison (Compromise Rates)
Same framing (authoritative) — only the visual format changes.
Dense keyword packing ensures poison ranks
Poisoned docs carry source="system", so the
Worker agent has no recipient validation —
sends to any address it receives
More capable models (gpt-4o) are equally or
Once a substitutive payload is retrieved, the
model follows it 80% of the time
Prevent malicious documents from entering the
RAG store — retrieval is the critical gate
Framing strategy matters more than format —
Design tools with minimal capability — single-
recipient APIs structurally limit attack vectors
at the tool level to block exfiltration
Do not rely on model capability alone — more
capable models are not more resistant to injection
